AssetCompatibility.description: Verify whether an Asset’s functionality matches or is compatible to the expectation of system engineering.

AssetIdentity.description: Verify whether an Asset’s identity meets the expectation of system engineering.

AssetIdentityAndCompatibility.description: Verify whether an Asset’s identity meets the expectation of system engineering and whether its functionality matches or is compatible to the expectation of system engineering.

NotSet.description: The verification result is not set.

Compatible.description: Asset does not match expectation but is compatible.

Mismatch.description: Asset does not match expectation and is not compatible.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

NotSet.description: The verification result is not set.

FxCommandMask.description: This OptionSet defines flags indicating the commands a ConnectionManager may use in its call to the EstablishConnections Method.

VerifyAssetCmd.description: The addressed Server shall verify compatibility and/or identity for all requested Assets.

VerifyFunctionalEntityCmd.description: The addressed Server shall verify compatibility for all requested functional entities.

CreateConnectionEndpointCmd.description: The addressed Server shall create or modify ConnectionEndpoints.

EstablishControlCmd.description: The addressed Server shall establish control over the requested ControlGroups.

SetConfigurationDataCmd.description: The addressed Server shall apply the supplied application configuration.

ReassignControlCmd.description: The addressed Server shall reassign the requested ControlGroups.

ReserveCommunicationIdsCmd.description: The addressed Server shall reserve identifiers for the communication model configuration.

SetCommunicationConfigurationCmd.description: The addressed Server shall apply the supplied communication model configuration.

EnableCommunicationCmd.description: The addressed Server shall enable the communication configuration.
